pi_items.source: NEMA ICS 16 standard specification. Multiple sources confirm NEMA 17 has 4 mounting holes in a 31mm x 31mm square pattern (center-to-center). Verified via: RepRap wiki (https://reprap.org/wiki/NEMA_17_Stepper_motor), Components101 (https://components101.com/motors/nema17-stepper-motor), MotorMicro (https://www.motormicro.com/nema-17-dimensions-size-chart-specs-guide), and Novanta IMS datasheets.

NEMA ICS 16 standard specification. The centering collar (also called mounting boss or reference diameter) on NEMA 17 motors is 0.866 inches, which equals 22mm. Verified via Novanta IMS NEMA 17 datasheet (https://www.novantaims.com/downloads/quickreference/NEMA17.pdf) and MotorMicro dimensions guide (https://www.motormicro.com/nema-17-dimensions-size-chart-specs-guide).

NEMA ICS 16 standard. NEMA 17 stepper motors have a faceplate of 1.7 x 1.7 inches (42.3 x 42.3mm). Verified via multiple sources: RepRap NEMA 17 wiki (https://reprap.org/wiki/NEMA_17_Stepper_motor), Components101 (https://components101.com/motors/nema17-stepper-motor), MotorMicro (https://www.motormicro.com/nema-17-dimensions-size-chart-specs-guide), ASPINA (https://us.aspina-group.com/en/learning-zone/columns/what-is/033/), and IC-Components (https://www.ic-components.com/blog/NEMA17-Stepper-Motor-Guide.jsp).

NEMA ICS 16 standard for NEMA 17 stepper motors. The standard specifies 4 M3 mounting holes. Verified via RepRap NEMA Motor wiki (https://reprap.org/wiki/NEMA_Motor), Novanta datasheets, and multiple motor specification sheets confirming 4 M3 tapped mounting holes in all NEMA 17 motors.

This is a task design choice, not an industry standard. NEMA 17 motors themselves do not specify 'frame holes' or V-slot attachment. This minimum of 2 frame holes is defined by the task creator as a parametric motor mount design requirement.

pi_items.metadata_value: 20mm x 20mm with 20mm slot pitch (from task description)
pi_items.verified_value: 20mm x 20mm profile; slot opening is 6mm; T-slot pitch is NOT 20mm
pi_items.source: OpenBuilds V-slot product specifications and aluminum extrusion industry standards. Web search confirmed V-slot 2020 is a 20x20mm profile with 6mm T-slot openings. No sources verify a '20mm slot pitch' — standard T-slot pitches are 25mm, 30mm, or 40mm. Verified via: Maker Store (https://makerstore.cc/product/v-slot-20-x-20mm/), Aluxprofile (https://www.aluxprofile.com/aluminium-slot-profile-2020-v-slot/a3663), OpenBuilds (https://us.openbuilds.com/v-slot-20x20-linear-rail/), and standard aluminum extrusion references from Engineers Edge and 80/20 (https://8020.net/20-2020.html).

privileged_info_summary: The parametric motor mount task uses real NEMA 17 stepper motor specifications from NEMA ICS 16 standard: 42.3mm square body, 4 M3 mounting holes at 31mm x 31mm pattern, and 22mm centering collar diameter. These are verified industry standards used in thousands of real robot designs. The task design requires a parametric mount compatible with V-slot 2020 aluminum extrusion (20x20mm profile with 6mm T-slot) with a minimum of 2 frame mounting holes. Data is not synthetic — all dimensions come from public standards and real products.
